items.creator: Bob Dylan
items.title: Subterranean Homesick Blues
items.comment: If foresight people start behaving as weather-men, oh my gosh. The useful question is what foresight adds when the wind is already felt: better framing, better consequences, better contestation, and better attention to who pretends not to notice.

note: Keep song lyric excerpts very short; use commentary rather than reproducing lyrics.
